extra_model_fields.verifier_issues_summary: Two issues: (1) The grader makes claims about workbook-embedded formulas/validation that are unsupported by the available parsed evidence (XLSX could not be parsed in preview; preview shows openpyxl_unavailable). The grader notes this limitation but still asserts the presence of formula checks and a Validation sheet without parsed-cell evidence. (2) The actual_outputs contain absolute local filesystem paths (e.g. [REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]), which constitutes a hidden-reference leakage that the grader did not flag.
